activities.title: Financial Advisory Venture Pitch
instructions: 8-minute entrepreneur pitch covering: problem, target market, advisory experience, FNA process, client acquisition, growth model, why AIA as platform
No product demos or commission focus

activities.title: 120-Hour Gate Artifact Audit
instructions: Verify opportunity memo, FNA notes, Growth Engines, platform rationale, pitch deck
Record gate status with remediation plan if needed

activities.title: Week 4 Build Focus
instructions: Draft one sentence: what you will build in Week 4
